Brands: Over 2000 individual hotels, across well known luxury brands and many independent properties
Notes: Consortia for high end luxury travel agents. Prestige in the industry a large range of hotels & resorts, villas, cruises and experiences - rooms get US$100 one time credit, suites get US$200 one time credit and multi-bedroom residences get US$200 per bedroom. Breakfast benefit can be in the restaurant or in-room

Brands: Four Seasons Hotels & Resorts, Four Seasons Yacht, Four Seasons private Jet experiences
Notes: For all four seasons hotels & resorts, yachts and private jet experience. Always the same as the price on the FS website but with the partner perks, often with additional exclusive perks like guaranteed upgrade

Brands: Waldorf Astoria, Conrad, LXR, NoMad, Signia by Hilton
Notes: Used to be called Hilton Impresario, interesting perk is double HH bonus points, full loyalty program benefits, for North America the breakfast perk is in addition the daily food credit through Gold or higher status. In the rest of the world the breakfast benefit replaces the HH benefit (so you get breakfast for 2, not breakfast for 4),special free night promotions or member rates are available at times. All the hotels of the brands participate. Some hotels may require a 2-night minimum depending depending on region and time of year (Conrad Dubai comes to mind)

Brands: Mandarin Oriental Hotels & Resorts and Mandarin Oriental Exceptional Homes
Notes: For Mandarin Oriental Exceptional Homes, you get a US$500 credit. Suite stays get an enhanced US$200 credit total (US$100 dining and US$100 spa credit), rooms get US$100 total - Mandarin Oriental, Jakarta and Mandarin Oriental, Kuala Lumpur offer a reduced dining credit. Breakfast benefit can be in the restaurant or in-room (room service fees apply)

Brands: Langham, Cordis, Eaton and Chelsea Hotel Toronto
Notes: Hotel credit varies by property - generally US$50 for 1 night, US$100 for 2 nights, $125 for 3+ nights

Brands: The Ritz-Carlton, St. Regis, The Luxury Collection, Bvlgari, Ritz-Carlton Reserve, Edition, Ritz-Carlton Reserve and the Ritz-Carlton Yacht Collection
Notes: Unlike LUMINOUS, all hotels include the hotel credit. Very few require a 2-night minimum stay

Brands: W Hotels, JW Marriott, Autograph Collection Hotels, Marriott Hotels, Westin, Le Méridien, Renaissance, Tribute Portfolio, Sheraton, Delta Hotels and Gaylord Hotels
Notes: Only select (usually full service) properties of the brands participate. The US$100 credit is only offered by some of the hotels. You get all your Marriott Bonvoy benefits in addition - so you can choose points instead of breakfast for Platinum Elite and higher members. Breakfast can just be continental (especially in North America, it’s good to double check - sometimes the hotel also participates in Virtuoso with better benefits)

Brands: Set Collection
Notes: US$200 credit from 4 nights, very select group of hotels around the world, newer program

Brands: Shangri-La, Kerry Hotels
Notes: Not all hotels (especially in china) participate, includes a guaranteed room upgrade for many categories

Brands: Park Hyatt, Alila, Mirava, Impression by Secrets, Unbound Collection, Andaz, Thompson, The Standard, StandardX, Bunkhouse Hotels, Zoëtry Wellness & Spa Resorts, Hyatt Ziva, Hyatt Zilara, Secrets Resorts & Spas, Dreams Resorts & Spas, Grand Hyatt, Hyatt Regency, Destination by Hyatt, Hyatt Centric
Notes: Not all hotels of the brands participate, some require a 2 night minimum stay, some all inclusive ones require 4+/5+ nights, Hyatt’s upgrades are subject to availability - but they are confirmed shortly after booking depending on projected occupancy

Brands: Rosewood Hotels & Resorts
Notes: Guaranteed upgrade for many of the hotels, many great promotions

Brands: Jumeirah Hotels & Resorts
Notes: Special benefits are included at Burj al Arab (currently under construction) and Marsa al Arab with higher hotel credits and better upgrades. Usually, the benefits can be combined with different meal plans. Airport transfers for suite bookings. 4pm checkout if available as a benefit

Brands: Kempinski Hotels & Resorts
Notes: Some hotels only offer a US$50 credit, most of them have a US$100 credit

Brands: Peninsula Hotels & Resort
Notes: PenClub and guaranteed upgrades are the standout, if the room isn’t ready they will place you in a hospitality room, there are some specific rules of the upgrades and hotel credit depending on the region

Brands: Rocco Forte Hotels & Resorts, Rocco Forte Private Villas
Notes: US$100 hotel credit fro rooms, US$200 for suites (2-night minimum), US$200 credit for Rocco Forte House, US$250 credit for Rocco Forte Private Villas, 20% off spa services (excluding Hotel Savoy, Hotel Amigo, and Hotel Astoria)

Brands: Belmond Hotels & Resorts, Trains, boats and safaris
Notes: Hotel credit for hotels & safari: US$90 for rooms and US$200 for suites; trains & cruises: US$100/person per journey, US$45/person for day trips

Brands: Dorchester Collection
Notes: Truly flexible hotel credit (will be deducted from the total bill at the end) and it the local currency - so in the UK its £100, in Europe its 100€ and the US $100. Rooms get a guaranteed room upgrade. One-bedroom suites and higher get airport transfers and 100 credit per day (no upgrades). Breakfast can be in the restaurant or through in-room dining. They will always give the upgrade.

Brands: Oetker Collection
Notes: US$100 credit fro 1 night, US$200 for 2+ nights - depending on the hotel it is either for F&B or the Spa or both. Guaranteed upgrades need to be confirmed after booking and are subject to availability

Brands: Anantara Hotels & Resorts
Notes: No breakfast. Can be combined with almost all rates. Instead includes a special Anantara Journeys amenity which is unique to each property

Brands: Pan Pacific
Notes: Only select properties participate

Brands: Design Hotels
Notes: The ‘main’ benefit for rooms and suites is different, suites usually get a higher credit or a better amenity. Only select hotels participate. You don’t get Marriott Bonvoy benefits or night credits as it’s booked through Design Hotels

Brands: Independent hotels that are part of Preferred Hotels
Notes: Only select properties participate

Brands: Independent hotels that are part of Small Luxury Hotels
Notes: Only select properties participate. 2-night minimum is required. Hotel credit is usually US$50 for rooms and US$100 for suites. You don’t get Hilton Honors benefits or night credits as it’s booked through Small Luxury Hotels.

Brands: Independent hotels that are part of Relais & Chateau
Notes: Only select properties participate.There is no hotel credit, the main benefit is an upgrade if available and a VIP welcome amenity

Brands: Orient Express (yacht, trains and hotels), 21c museum hotels, Fairmont, Raffles, FAENA, Sofitel Legend, Emblems Collection, Sofitel, , Banyan Tree, MGallery Collection, 25h hours, Delano, Hyde, Mondrian, Morgan Originals, Paris Society Collection, Rixis, SLS, SO/, the hoxton, Garrya, Angasa
Notes: Also called Accor HERA (previously Accor STEP) No all hotels for the different brands participate. Some hotels require a 2-night stay or is only available for suite bookings. All ALL Accor benefits are included (based on the program guidelines, some brands don’t participate)

Brands: Six Senses, Regent, InterContinental, Kimpton, Hotel Indigo, Vignette Collection
Notes: Replaced IHG Luxury Collection and IHG Lifestyle Collection programs. No all hotels for the different brands participate. All IHG One benefits are included (based on the program guidelines, some brands don’t participate). Some hotels may require a 2-night minimum depending depending on region and time of year.
